mapper.sql: EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM dataset_endpoint de INNER JOIN endpoint e ON e.key = de.endpoint_key WHERE de.dataset_key = m.dataset_key AND e.type = 'DWC_DP' )

ORDER BY CASE e.type WHEN 'EML' THEN 0 WHEN 'DIGIR_MANIS' THEN 1 WHEN 'DIGIR' THEN 2 WHEN 'BIOCASE' THEN 3 WHEN 'TAPIR' THEN 4 WHEN 'BIOCASE_XML_ARCHIVE' THEN 5 WHEN 'DWC_ARCHIVE' THEN 6 WHEN 'CAMTRAP_DP' THEN 7 WHEN 'DWC_DP' THEN 8 WHEN 'COLDP' THEN 9 ELSE -1 END DESC, e.modified DESC NULLS LAST, e.key DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO metadata( dataset_key, type, created, created_by, modified, modified_by, content, content_json ) VALUES( #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER}, 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type, now(), #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, convert_to(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'UTF8'), CAST(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb) );
mapper.update: UPDATE metadata SET modified = now(), modified_by = #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = convert_to(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'UTF8'), content_json = CAST(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb) WHERE dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type;
mapper.select:
WITH latest AS ( SELECT m.content_json AS metadata, m.modified FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.content_json IS NOT NULL AND ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT latest.metadata::text AS metadata, latest.modified, ( SELECT e.key FROM endpoint e INNER JOIN dataset_endpoint de ON de.endpoint_key = e.key WHERE de.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND e.type = 'DWC_DP'
) AS endpoint_key FROM latest
SELECT m.content_json -> 'resources' FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.content_json IS NOT NULL AND ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1

WITH latest AS ( SELECT m.content_json AS metadata FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.content_json IS NOT NULL AND ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT res AS resource FROM latest, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(metadata->'resources') res WHERE res->>'name' = #{resourceName} LIMIT 1

WITH latest AS ( SELECT m.content_json AS metadata FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.content_json IS NOT NULL AND ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT jsonb_agg(res->>'${resourceNameFieldName}') FROM latest, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(metadata->'resources') res

SELECT count(DISTINCT de.dataset_key) FROM dataset_endpoint de INNER JOIN endpoint e ON e.key = de.endpoint_key WHERE e.type = 'DWC_DP' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = de.dataset_key AND m.content_json IS NOT NULL )
